name: Warm Pineapple Mousse with Toasted Shredded Coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the pineapple purée and heavy cream. Stir together and heat on medium for 8 to 10 minutes until reduced to a syrup. Keep warm.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together egg yolks and cornstarch. Add this mixture to the cream mixture. Cook, constantly whisking, for 6 to 8 minutes until it reaches the consistency of medium whipped cream. Set aside.
3. In another small bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer on low speed for 2 to 3 minutes until frothy. Turn the mixer to high and slowly pour in sugar-water mixture down the side of the bowl while continuing to beat. Beat for 8 to 10 more minutes until meringue is very shiny and the bottom of the bowl is cool.
4. Gently fold the cream mixture into the beaten egg whites.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Spoon the mixture into each of 4 small soufflé dishes, filling them about halfway. Sprinkle shredded coconut over the top. Fill the dishes almost to the rim with remaining mixture and sprinkle powdered sugar on top.
6. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until set. Remove from oven. Place under a preheated broiler for 30 seconds or until sugar is caramelized.
